title: An Act Regarding Distributions from the Stipend Fund for Agricultural Fair Competitions and Events
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Feb 26, 2026
last_house_action: 12/3/2025 - Received by the Clerk of the House on December 3, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
last_senate_action: 2/26/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
